title: Stocks are soaring. But the Iran war’s economic damage is far from over.
summary_full: The surge in optimism contrasts starkly with continued energy supply challenges that threaten long-lasting economic harm — and a market reckoning.
summary_public: The surge in optimism contrasts starkly with continued energy supply challenges that threaten long-lasting economic harm — and a market reckoning.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war’s economic damage is far from over.
